69075.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
69075.transcript: We know not the meaning of damsel in distress!

338222.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
338222.transcript: Even your scythe is possessed of fearsome proportion!

13865529.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
13865529.transcript: Indeed. And yet, we must ever aspire to greater heights.

18872833.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
18872833.transcript: I shan't budge even an inch to the enemy!

22275971.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
22275971.transcript: There will be no tomorrow if we fall today!

22362588.label: PL1200_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
22362588.transcript: We mustn't let them overtake us!

22923832.label: PL1200_vo_DUO_buff_A_2
22923832.transcript: I am a wellspring of fury!

23715366.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
23715366.transcript: Teaming up against us will not alter the outcome!

27659103.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish_1
27659103.transcript: There is no foe we cannot conquer!

31912954.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
31912954.transcript: Haha! But we haven't even begun to fight!

32840675.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
32840675.transcript: That is because I train twice as much as your average knight!

42403249.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2
42403249.transcript: We're a force to be reckoned with!

45989593.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
45989593.transcript: We did not come here to play!

48080576.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
48080576.transcript: Do not give up, friends! Where there's a will, there's a way!

51155810.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_call_1
51155810.transcript: To me! Huh? Where... Where are you looking!

59607947.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
59607947.transcript: So this is the might of the Astrals!

67636590.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
67636590.transcript: You are most courteous, Sir Lancelot.

74351181.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
74351181.transcript: I am rather proud of my speed.

85483214.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
85483214.transcript: I too must attain such high glory!

88179639.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_2
88179639.transcript: I shall expose their every flaw!

96540108.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL0100
96540108.transcript: I'll make quick work of this!

98952808.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C
98952808.transcript: Keep your shields high and weapons drawn!

108385602.label: PL1200_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
108385602.transcript: Behold! The captain of the Lumiel Order!

116921971.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
116921971.transcript: A knight never runs from the call of duty!

126480811.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
126480811.transcript: I shall think twice before swatting flies! Now that I know how they feel!

129816540.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
129816540.transcript: Seek the shortest path to victory!

152132934.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
152132934.transcript: That pack of yours deserves the highest honors!

154114432.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_thanks_2
154114432.transcript: How can I ever repay you?

163234787.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
163234787.transcript: You were quite good yourself, Sir Rolan.

165062438.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
165062438.transcript: We've won the fight! But the war rages on!

167423939.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
167423939.transcript: A blade as fair and terrible as the sea!

167618143.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
167618143.transcript: Today shall conclude this nonsensical rivalry!

189711419.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
189711419.transcript: I shall put everything into this battle!

194519147.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
194519147.transcript: And yet I could fight hundreds more!

209006933.label: PL1200_vo_NAV_get_snp_2
209006933.transcript: You're safe with me, my good pincer!

214184081.label: PL1200_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_3
214184081.transcript: My life was hanging by a thread!

222280950.label: PL1200_vo_DUO_recovery_C
222280950.transcript: This aid is most aptly rendered!

233826064.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
233826064.transcript: Stay vigilant! This battle is not won yet!

234197422.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
234197422.transcript: Righteousness runs through the blade, and purity sits upon the hilt.

239964860.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
239964860.transcript: I have much to learn about the art of war.

240215789.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
240215789.transcript: No one matches the fury of our combined might!

242456891.label: PL1200_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
242456891.transcript: A grand triumph for the order!

242530081.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
242530081.transcript: We constantly strive to outdo ourselves!

246409757.label: PL1200_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
246409757.transcript: I am the picture of prudence!

247017446.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
247017446.transcript: Your swordsmanship leaves nothing to be desired!

250384520.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
250384520.transcript: You would be wise not to underestimate us!

250961291.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
250961291.transcript: Come now, that was too easy.

251848851.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
251848851.transcript: Lie down, wolf! We don't have time to play!

253311598.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
253311598.transcript: Charlotta Fenia is always prepared to perform bold and heroic rescues!

255053060.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
255053060.transcript: Sir Percival, don't hold back on account of me!

263361805.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
263361805.transcript: True aim is the sign of a true heart!

268564471.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
268564471.transcript: I can only pray the catalyst is still in one piece!

269140823.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_pose_3
269140823.transcript: May justice reign throughout the skies!

271131216.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
271131216.transcript: Sylvain, later if you would be so kind.

272673562.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
272673562.transcript: I am a wall of justice!

277191692.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
277191692.transcript: Whatever you do, do not step into the magma!

284566491.label: PL1200_vo_ETC_comeback_1
284566491.transcript: I swear on my sword, I will not fail!

287926410.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
287926410.transcript: I will never back down from you, louts!

293457989.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
293457989.transcript: Do not let your attention wander!

310094543.label: PL1200_vo_DUO_recovery_A
310094543.transcript: How shall I ever repay you?

310101932.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
310101932.transcript: A grand triumph for the order!

322382388.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
322382388.transcript: I'm proud to fight beside you!

326845610.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
326845610.transcript: Allow me to serve as our spearhead!

327051809.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
327051809.transcript: Stuff hardly conveys the awe-inspiring power of Lumiel!

342517862.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
342517862.transcript: Fellow Harvin or no, you'll garner no sympathy from me!

345787284.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
345787284.transcript: Do not rest until our mission is through!

350403927.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0100
350403927.transcript: I pledge victory upon this blade!

372230809.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
372230809.transcript: Careful! One mistake means certain death!

373343251.label: PL1200_vo_ETC_lockon_4
373343251.transcript: Know the wrath of a holy knight!

373595115.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
373595115.transcript: What strapping dorsal muscles! I am almost envious!

378554279.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
378554279.transcript: Together we foiled their evil schemes!

380576531.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
380576531.transcript: Sir Rolan, do not play dumb with me! You know I am down here!

390127457.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1
390127457.transcript: Our combined strength can move mountains!

394266759.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
394266759.transcript: Heed me! Victory is ours for the taking!

407958539.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
407958539.transcript: By my holy blade, I shall purify you!

412041208.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_C
412041208.transcript: Purge the evil from these scales!

412395834.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
412395834.transcript: Size is no measure of ability!

418870125.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
418870125.transcript: It matters not, for we shall beat them back!

424740664.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
424740664.transcript: By the honor of the holy knights!

425584888.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
425584888.transcript: You live up to the tales!

431520475.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
431520475.transcript: We mustn't allow the red ship to escape!

432487191.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
432487191.transcript: Only the wicked shall fall today, Lilith!

440864269.label: PL1200_vo_NAV_throw_slow_reaction_2
440864269.transcript: They won't move so fast now!

447087654.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
447087654.transcript: All evil flees before our blades!

449040047.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
449040047.transcript: My noble blade cuts even the hardest of stones!

461046086.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
461046086.transcript: See how our enemies tremble before you!

461810848.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
461810848.transcript: Id, heed our call! We've come to your rescue!

475442259.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
475442259.transcript: Come now, I hardly lifted a finger.

481722351.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B
481722351.transcript: Sword of Lumiel! Show us the light!

491425469.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
491425469.transcript: We stand tall, even in the presence of a mighty primal!

492583941.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
492583941.transcript: Your blade is just as captivating.

499944255.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_3
499944255.transcript: My mind is a steel trap!

502538952.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
502538952.transcript: Masters of hand-to-hand combat are not to be trifled with!

511187566.label: PL1200_vo_ETC_comeback_2
511187566.transcript: My work has only just begun!

514078031.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
514078031.transcript: If words can't reach you, my sword will!

516597106.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_call_2
516597106.transcript: This way! No! Other way! Other way!

525780421.label: PL1200_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_2
525780421.transcript: How many crowns am I wearing?

528734511.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL0000
528734511.transcript: I'll make quick work of this!

537128895.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
537128895.transcript: Only one side shall emerge triumphant!

538174119.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
538174119.transcript: A blade of shifting form! There's good pointers to be had here.

546302196.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
546302196.transcript: Then he acknowledges my superior stature! Good boy!

552621170.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
552621170.transcript: This is your last chance to retreat, scoundrel!

554654985.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
554654985.transcript: I've unleashed but a fraction of my true power!

557836326.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
557836326.transcript: How dare you scratch our beloved Grand Cypher!

558732904.label: PL1200_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
558732904.transcript: Bright sword, blessed is thy steel!

560298393.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
560298393.transcript: That was most honorably done, sir.

568630629.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
568630629.transcript: I call forth divinity's blessing to expunge evil!

575011427.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
575011427.transcript: We shall have to do that again!

578282669.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
578282669.transcript: Your flimsy arsenal won't save you, sorceress!

578533007.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
578533007.transcript: As she always has and always will.

584635740.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
584635740.transcript: My twin in years, let us walk the path of chivalry side by side!

590506553.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
590506553.transcript: Of you knaves, you've gone too far!

595983372.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
595983372.transcript: Are we not a most formidable team?

610309329.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
610309329.transcript: I dare say there is malice on the wind.

613781414.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
613781414.transcript: To make a revel of violence! It's shameless!

620186860.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
620186860.transcript: A battle mage? Now there's an idea!

621787624.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
621787624.transcript: My sword and your whip sing as one!

626403825.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
626403825.transcript: Your swordplay garners my utmost admiration!

634893972.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
634893972.transcript: Keep this up and we shall win in no time!

638453009.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
638453009.transcript: Let us scour this fiendish place!

643310119.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
643310119.transcript: This holy sword is my strength!

648088784.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
648088784.transcript: So broad, so tall! You are the picture of a mountain!

648109942.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
648109942.transcript: I cannot afford mercy against this varlet!

648891567.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
648891567.transcript: Your size fails to impress me!

656168820.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
656168820.transcript: Of course! Holy knights are the very picture of sophistication!

656408062.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
656408062.transcript: Combat in this skydome is no different than fighting at home!

660609956.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
660609956.transcript: We cannot afford to waver! And yet...

662022581.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
662022581.transcript: Let's vanquish this foe and head for the top!

662272078.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
662272078.transcript: Have no fear, Historia. I shall keep you safe!

668089342.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
668089342.transcript: Now steer us to triumph, most skilled of helmsmen!

671955354.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
671955354.transcript: None shall stand in our way!

673413607.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
673413607.transcript: Pay attention to the wolf's form and fight accordingly!

682724610.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
682724610.transcript: I'll slice you up as many times as you like!

683586461.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
683586461.transcript: We have come too far to suffer another shameful defeat!

684688731.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
684688731.transcript: Oh, most loyal and courageous comrades!

686756730.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_call_3
686756730.transcript: I'm over here! Hello! Can you hear me?

688793734.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
688793734.transcript: You are truly an admirable ally!

692352220.label: PL1200_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
692352220.transcript: You reap what you sow, Violet!

703740184.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
703740184.transcript: An ant can lift five thousand times its body weight. Why not a mighty knight?

707463584.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
707463584.transcript: Never have I seen a more grand and puissant blade!

716888666.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
716888666.transcript: I feel sorry for the next villains who cross our path!

720360997.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
720360997.transcript: Gorgeous! I thought only mountainous models got called gorgeous!

723705835.label: PL1200_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
723705835.transcript: Hah! That was a battle for the ages!

732385113.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
732385113.transcript: Do your worst, godly dragon! We will never capitulate!

740792893.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
740792893.transcript: When it comes to camaraderie, we have you beat!

742055638.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
742055638.transcript: You aren't mocking me, are you?

742232165.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_pose_1
742232165.transcript: Hmph! Long live the Lumiel Order of Holy Knights!

744212713.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
744212713.transcript: Only veteran skyfarers could execute such a stratagem!

751505856.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
751505856.transcript: Behold! The power of our ironclad bonds!

758268294.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
758268294.transcript: I know that went rather well.

760535872.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
760535872.transcript: Our target lies underground! Not here!

767486270.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
767486270.transcript: Oh, I envy your lithe figure and your immense strength!

773529994.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
773529994.transcript: Your royal blade shall pass into legend.

776250820.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
776250820.transcript: If I can't stop you here, I don't deserve to be a holy knight!

777563204.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
777563204.transcript: Can't you see that Lilith treats you as her pawns?

777642887.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0100
777642887.transcript: And score a zero for evil!

777899075.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
777899075.transcript: You are no jest yourself, Sir Yodarha!

779995640.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
779995640.transcript: With magic like that, you're hardly in need of a hero.

786423630.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
786423630.transcript: You brought this punishment upon yourself!

788288685.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_3
788288685.transcript: I'll sneak with all of my might!

796500869.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
796500869.transcript: I said your size fails to impress me!

800137703.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
800137703.transcript: You are a prodigious knight yourself, Sir Siegfried!

802544349.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
802544349.transcript: Such menacing weapons must be dismantled!

809828027.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
809828027.transcript: You have my undying gratitude, sorceress!

819443335.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
819443335.transcript: We stand upon the precipice of great upheaval!

837349516.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
837349516.transcript: Lumiel was my mentor, and virtue my muse.

839263410.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
839263410.transcript: The tide of virtue shall wash away all wickedness!

839919727.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
839919727.transcript: But of course! It was honed to a fine point by generations of holy knights!

845024017.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_speak_3
845024017.transcript: In this noble sword burns true virtue!

848100189.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
848100189.transcript: Smashing teamwork! If I do say so myself.

855503333.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
855503333.transcript: Your arrogance has gone unchecked for far too long!

869205302.label: PL1200_vo_MOV_wait_cold_7
869205302.transcript: Hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah

870906163.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
870906163.transcript: Charlotta Fenia does not know defeat!

873123428.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
873123428.transcript: My heart rejoices to have such a warrior at my back!

874444292.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
874444292.transcript: The Dragon of Destruction lives up to its name!

874731348.label: PL1200_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
874731348.transcript: Never you fear! Victory is assured!

877771451.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
877771451.transcript: But of course! A holy knight never tires marching along the path of righteousness!

878885330.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_congrats_3
878885330.transcript: I... I cannot find the words!

892226590.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
892226590.transcript: Haha! Call on me whenever you wish!

901167960.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
901167960.transcript: Wonderful camaraderie! We're a sight to behold!

904382994.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
904382994.transcript: Oh, my stalwart allies! You are amazing!

910320483.label: PL1200_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
910320483.transcript: Understood! I shall focus on defense!

913813279.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
913813279.transcript: Never expect less than great from a holy knight!

915986978.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
915986978.transcript: Sacred light of my sword! Pierce the heart of darkness!

928170413.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
928170413.transcript: Obvious shall pay for their transgressions!

946538056.label: PL1200_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_4
946538056.transcript: Honor binds me! Back to the fight!

957141778.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
957141778.transcript: You are indeed a most worthy knight, Noble Catalina!

958402890.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
958402890.transcript: I soar on the wings of virtue!

973710950.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
973710950.transcript: For my comrades! For the skies! I fight for all!

978076544.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
978076544.transcript: Never have I encountered a more sinister power!

981728152.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
981728152.transcript: There has to be a way to cut it down to size!

985100468.label: PL1200_vo_DUO_rescue2_B
985100468.transcript: I must make a sorry sight.

986695021.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
986695021.transcript: One must strive for ever greater heights!

990790490.label: PL1200_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_C
990790490.transcript: Brace yourselves for a grand attack!

996626322.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
996626322.transcript: They boast impressive speed! Stay on guard!

997847080.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
997847080.transcript: Thanks largely in part to my sister in arms.

1005428097.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
1005428097.transcript: My blade is a shining symbol of virtue!

1018240476.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
1018240476.transcript: We must reach the summit! Nothing else matters!

1025850739.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
1025850739.transcript: Consider this a warm-up before the showdown with Lilith!

1030554369.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
1030554369.transcript: Of course! Our hearts are pure and our cause just!

1035648535.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
1035648535.transcript: You cut a most valiant figure!

1036730281.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
1036730281.transcript: Don't let our previous victory cloud your judgment!

1037787564.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
1037787564.transcript: I am rather famed for my intellect.

1052828519.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
1052828519.transcript: My name is Charlotta, and I'm your worst nightmare!

1053781167.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_B
1053781167.transcript: We must gain the upper hand somehow!

1054251746.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
1054251746.transcript: We did rather well. If I say so myself.

1057954916.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0900
1057954916.transcript: I expected no less from you, sir Vane!

1058114955.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
1058114955.transcript: Arvin's favor, large blades, you know.

1060137863.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
1060137863.transcript: Treat me as a pushover at your own risk!

1067506715.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
1067506715.transcript: Now now, there's no need for such courtesy between friends.

1068964404.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
1068964404.transcript: You have, or rather are, noble spirits.

36888747.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
36888747.transcript: Evil shall fall before our combined might!

38100248.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
38100248.transcript: Oh, holy light! Guide my blade with your blessing!

57606045.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
57606045.transcript: I see my years of unyielding training have borne fruit!

82969192.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
82969192.transcript: Behold the might of two boundless warriors!

84338467.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
84338467.transcript: That blast made my hair stand on end!

115575971.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
115575971.transcript: Then let us finish this post haste!

155678111.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
155678111.transcript: If I may ask, how did you achieve such a hulking physique?

174045492.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
174045492.transcript: If only I had your stature... Oh, the heights I could have reached!

207566320.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
207566320.transcript: Where holy light and blackest night converge, true strength may be found!

209158614.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
209158614.transcript: The virtuous shall punish the villainous!

222968126.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
222968126.transcript: Our foes would do well not to forget that!

273255192.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
273255192.transcript: Our explosive fury cannot be contained!

293334035.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
293334035.transcript: We may be short in stature, but not on valor!

308500227.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
308500227.transcript: My apologies for aggravating your vision!

347699755.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
347699755.transcript: Amazing! As expected from this skydom's greatest warrior!

399815053.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
399815053.transcript: Strike with honor, Sword of Lumiel!

410801387.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
410801387.transcript: Alchemy is a petrifying force to behold!

427161500.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
427161500.transcript: Oh holy blade, light our path forward and guide us to victory!

432354992.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
432354992.transcript: Good sir, none can face our combined might!

442180221.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
442180221.transcript: Why does she get to fly? I wish I could fly.

462982382.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
462982382.transcript: Nay, Lady Frau! It is you who makes battle a zephyr!

465779369.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
465779369.transcript: The Black Dragon's Fang in action! What a marvelous blade!

480678075.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
480678075.transcript: Your expert shooting thinned out their ranks!

482197457.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
482197457.transcript: We are kindred spirits, ceaseless in our quest for greatness!

493162661.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
493162661.transcript: The quintessence of Lumiel's sword arts has yet to reveal itself!

516921732.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
516921732.transcript: I have never seen a more beautiful barrage in my life!

531951359.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
531951359.transcript: Well, I shan't argue with the general of such martial prowess!

565330972.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
565330972.transcript: The nerve! It's forever pure, forever righteous!

659500893.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
659500893.transcript: The six dragons fight with truly tremendous powers!

674787497.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
674787497.transcript: Yes! With the side of justice!

688155526.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
688155526.transcript: What beautiful trickery! If only I could do the same!

697473028.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
697473028.transcript: It was a privilege to witness your superb arts!

704577874.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
704577874.transcript: Forgive me! I must be more considerate to our gunman!

719466087.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
719466087.transcript: Together we pave the way! For light and fire shine as one!

741311420.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
741311420.transcript: The day is ours! Continue the assault!

744155001.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
744155001.transcript: Wherever justice lives, there beauty thrives!

748457562.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
748457562.transcript: And I shall do the same to the next evildoers who cross us!

751100878.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
751100878.transcript: Alas, how much must one practice to perform such arts?

761708802.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
761708802.transcript: You serve fight with the might of a thousand knights!

764098119.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
764098119.transcript: This calls for a new maxim! Forever pure, forever gorgeous!

809684208.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
809684208.transcript: Think nothing of it! A knight never shrinks from the front line!

824016247.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
824016247.transcript: Adorable is the last impression I wish to impart!

836044657.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
836044657.transcript: In the name of justice, I shall be your judge!

848624028.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
848624028.transcript: Nerdu Wells always set me off!

859021047.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
859021047.transcript: The light of justice shines so that all may see its virtue!

868209913.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
868209913.transcript: You know more than most, Sir Id. Have faith. I've seen your efforts.

887737016.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
887737016.transcript: Your support fire has proven indispensable!

901695792.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
901695792.transcript: As captain of the Lumiel Order, I must always be a paragon of excellence!

909675894.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
909675894.transcript: Why, Lady Frau! Your strength is immense!

911088729.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
911088729.transcript: Such is the splendor of all who study Lumiel's holy blade!

921416080.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
921416080.transcript: We make a great team, don't we!

925170103.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
925170103.transcript: Though we share the same age, she's never mistaken for a child. I deserve respect too!

953011431.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
953011431.transcript: Do you wish to enlist? We are accepting recruits!

955921857.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
955921857.transcript: I am ever in your debt, milady!

962345227.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
962345227.transcript: Why, you could shoot through the eye of a needle if you so pleased!

993228949.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
993228949.transcript: I am honored to have my talent recognized by a legend!

1005617728.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
1005617728.transcript: Aww, if only I was blessed with your stature, Lady Fiddle!

1022495085.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
1022495085.transcript: Is there a secret to your indomitable will?

1038796922.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
1038796922.transcript: Even unto the darkest abyss will my light shine!

1060297597.label: PL1200_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
1060297597.transcript: Let us take up the shield!

1065198523.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
1065198523.transcript: Sterling job! Charging in from the flank!

1067820099.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
1067820099.transcript: Motto time! Forever pure, forever righteous!

95135076.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
95135076.transcript: My word! Your shots strike true! And deadly!

258828367.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
258828367.transcript: Huh? Am I supposed to laugh?

376569963.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
376569963.transcript: I must redouble my efforts, lest you outpace me!

412795536.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
412795536.transcript: Nay, it was your guidance which won us this day!

489093765.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
489093765.transcript: I have much to learn from the greatest swordsmen who wander these skies.

545965117.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
545965117.transcript: Ha ha! One, two, three, four, five, six! That was child's play!

555031384.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
555031384.transcript: It is an honor to receive such a remark, especially from the Sky Realm's strongest swordsman!

620714426.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
620714426.transcript: Twas but a breeze providing support for you, Sovan!

679962923.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
679962923.transcript: When did you join me in the fray?

733082566.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
733082566.transcript: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah!

821454351.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
821454351.transcript: If I could use flight magic, do you think my peers would look me in the eye?

916262345.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
916262345.transcript: Right you are! Back into the fray!

1027068414.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
1027068414.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six. Great.

3253622.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_1
3253622.transcript: Heh heh heh! Hi-yah! I think my form is improving!

171997823.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
171997823.transcript: I am honored to receive your divine aid!

743905632.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
743905632.transcript: I only do what duty commands of me!

806733966.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
806733966.transcript: When all else falls, only the righteous remain!

950900954.label: PL1200_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
950900954.transcript: Thank you for your support, Sandalphon!

953794548.label: PL1200_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL2100
953794548.transcript: I will strike with all my fury!

1024141138.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_2
1024141138.transcript: Heh heh! Yeah! Huh! Tchah! Beware, nerdy wails!

731234728.label: PL1200_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_1
731234728.transcript: Let the dinner bell ring! Absolutely delicious!
